overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk along a futuristic city road toward a drive-in theater with prominent neon signage, ending with entry into an interior office space. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon lights, futuristic streetlights, and a moody night atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside path toward the distant illuminated city skyline

bushes and small trees along the left roadside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dark asphalt road at night, passing futuristic curved streetlights. An industrial tower stands on the left hillside while the illuminated cyberpunk city skyline glows in the distance. A red sports car briefly passes by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching SPC drive-in theater with prominent neon signage

events.description: road curves revealing the SPC drive-in theater buildings with bright neon signs
turning right toward the theater entrance booth

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curving road then turning toward the drive-in theater entrance

entered.detail: large building complex with multiple SPC Drive-In Theater neon signs
small building with pink neon trim serving as theater entrance

segments.scene_description: The road curves to reveal the SPC Drive-In Theater complex with bright pink and blue neon signage. The camera turns toward the entrance booth, passing billboards and leaving the industrial roadside behind. The city skyline shifts to the left as the theater building dominates the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: drive-in theater ticket booth and interior office

events.description: entering the covered ticket booth area with pink neon lighting
opening door and entering the dimly lit interior office space

agents.ego_description: approaching the ticket booth, opening the door, and stepping into the green-lit interior office

entered.detail: bright pink neon light strips outlining the booth roof and entrance
poster with FIXER text on the booth wall near the door
small office space with green fluorescent lighting and scattered papers
cluttered desk with computer monitors and office supplies

segments.scene_description: Approaching the ticket booth with its distinctive pink neon trim, the camera moves through the entrance area and opens a door into a dimly lit interior office. The space features green fluorescent lighting, a cluttered desk with monitors, and a FIXER poster on the wall, marking a transition from the outdoor cyberpunk city to an enclosed commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, industrial roadside toward the neon-lit interior of a commercial office. It begins with a walk along a dark asphalt road beneath curved futuristic streetlights, passing an industrial tower while a red sports car streaks by against a distant, glowing city skyline. As the road curves, the industrial surroundings give way to the vibrant pink and blue neon signage of the SPC Drive-In Theater, which gradually dominates the view as the camera turns toward the entrance. The scene then shifts from the open night air to the theater's ticket booth, moving through the entrance area and passing through a door. Finally, the environment transforms into a dimly lit interior office characterized by green fluorescent lighting, cluttered monitors, and a Fixer poster on the wall.
